settings.heading: Corporate Annual Awards Night Trophy Packages
settings.subheading: A complete, co-ordinated awards kit for your company's yearly employee recognition event — Employee of the Year, Long Service, Top Performer, Rising Star and Team awards in one matched set. Crystal and metal options, logo-engraved, GST-invoiced, delivered across India.
settings.primary_cta_label: Plan our awards night on WhatsApp
settings.features_heading: A matched set for every award category
settings.price_caption: Indicative pricing per package; per-piece rates fall sharply at 50+ units. All corporate orders include GST invoice and engraving.
settings.steps_heading: How we run your awards-night order
settings.schema_name: Corporate Annual Awards Night Trophy Package

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Meru Trophy supplies complete annual-awards-night packages for corporate recognition events: Employee of the Year, Long Service (5/10/15 yrs), Top Performer, Rising Star, Team and Leadership awards as one co-ordinated, logo-engraved set. Crystal pieces run ₹350–₹5,000 each; with GST invoicing and pan-India delivery. Volume pricing kicks in from 50 units. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: One supplier for the whole stage
settings.text: An annual awards night has a dozen categories and a tight deadline. Sourcing each award separately risks mismatched finishes and a last-minute scramble. We design the entire set to share one visual language — same crystal family, same engraving style, your logo on every piece — so the stage looks intentional and premium. HR and admin teams get a single point of contact, one quote and one GST invoice.

settings.title: Employee of the Year & Top Performer
settings.text: Statement crystal or metal pieces that read as the night's headline awards.

settings.title: Long Service awards
settings.text: 5, 10, 15 and 20-year milestone awards with years and recipient names engraved.

settings.title: Team & department awards
settings.text: Larger shared trophies for winning teams, plus individual keepsakes for members.

settings.title: Company logo on every award
settings.text: Laser-engraved or UV-printed brand logo and award title — consistent across the full set.

settings.title: Send your award categories
settings.text: Share the list of categories, recipient counts and event date.

settings.title: Choose a design family
settings.text: We propose a co-ordinated crystal/metal set within your budget.

settings.title: Approve names & logo proof
settings.text: Sign off a digital mockup of engraving for every award.

settings.title: Delivered, boxed & labelled
settings.text: Each award boxed and tagged by category for an easy backstage handover.

settings.question: Do you provide a GST invoice for corporate orders?
settings.answer: Yes. All B2B orders include a proper GST invoice, and we can handle PO-based and tender-style documentation for larger procurements.

settings.question: Can each award have a different recipient name and title?
settings.answer: Absolutely. Send a sheet with category, recipient name and any citation text; we engrave each piece individually and label them for the ceremony.

settings.question: What's the lead time for an awards-night package?
settings.answer: Plan for 7–10 business days from proof approval for a full set. For 100+ piece enterprise programmes, give us 2–3 weeks. Rush options are available — ask on WhatsApp.

settings.question: Do you ship outside Bangalore?
settings.answer: Yes — we deliver pan-India from our Bangalore workshop, and ship internationally for overseas offices and diaspora events.

settings.heading: Hosting your annual awards night?
settings.text: Send us your award categories and date — we'll design a co-ordinated set and quote, GST invoice included.
